svg.title: AWS Data Lakehouse architecture v2
svg.desc: Pipeline completo: EventBridge → Lambdas → S3 Landing → Spark/Glue jobs → S3 Iceberg, com Glue Catalog emulado no Floci gerenciando o database uk_economy_db_local.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the UK ONS CPI inflation REST API')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the SFTP server Docker container')

svg.text: Terraform workspace: local · Provisioned via providers.tf

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the EventBridge cron rule trigger both Lambdas?')
sendPrompt('What does the uk_api_extractor Lambda do and how does it call the ONS API?')
sendPrompt('What does the uk_sftp_extractor Lambda do and how does paramiko work?')
sendPrompt('What IAM role is attached to the Lambda functions?')
sendPrompt('What is the folder structure inside the S3 landing zone bucket?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through what the landing_to_iceberg_inflation job does step by step')
sendPrompt('Walk me through what the landing_to_iceberg_companies job does step by step')
sendPrompt('Walk me through what the iceberg_companies_silver job does and what the business rule is')

svg.text: Glue Catalog (emulado no Floci) · database: uk_economy_db_local

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are the columns of the uk_cpi_inflation Iceberg table?')
sendPrompt('What are the columns of the uk_companies bronze Iceberg table?')
sendPrompt('What are the columns of the uk_companies_silver Iceberg table and what filter was applied?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Apache Iceberg data and metadata folder structure in the S3 bucket')
